title: The Hireling
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A fixer in 1940s Casablanca is hired to find a missing woman — but every answer leads deeper into a conspiracy involving Vichy France and the Resistance.
long_description:
Casablanca, 1941. Remy Deschamps is a fixer who finds things, loses things, and makes problems disappear for the right price. When a French expatriate hires him to locate a missing woman named Leila Bensoussan, the case seems routine. But Leila is no ordinary missing person.

She is a Jewish schoolteacher carrying her father's secret testimony — a ledger that documents Vichy collaboration and the transport of prisoners to labor camps. Half of Casablanca wants her silenced: the German liaison Captain Dietrich, the Vichy Special Branch operative Georges Vernet, and a network of informants that stretches from the medina to the prefecture.

Inspector Marcel Roux, a Vichy officer with his own hidden calculus, shadows every move. The deeper Remy digs, the more the case closes around him. He must navigate a world of smoky cafes, back-alley safe houses, and mountain hideouts — all while deciding whether he is still a man who works for money, or something else entirely.

The Hireling is a historical noir of double crosses and divided loyalties, set against the simmering tension of wartime Casablanca.
main_characters: Remy Deschamps — A fixer in Casablanca. Former soldier, former lover, current cynic.
Leila Bensoussan — The missing woman. A Jewish-Algerian schoolteacher turned Resistance Courier.
Inspector Marcel Roux — Vichy police inspector. A man of rules and rationed morality.
Lucien Moreau — The man who hires Remy. A French wine merchant with a hidden agenda.
Youssef Benali — A smuggler who knows every tunnel under the medina. Remy's oldest contact.
Captain Dietrich — A German liaison officer, cold and methodical.
Georges Vernet — Special Branch operative who does the prefecture's dirty work.
Marguerite Duvall — Owner of the Café de l'Oasis. Informant and broker.
Father Antoine — A priest whose confessional is a Resistance dead drop.
Simone Bensoussan — Leila's mother. A woman waiting for news.
